subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-17
subcodes.first_line: Actual despotic government is undesirable. A republican form of government is good, but a constitutional monarchy is better
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @relationship between government and people, @excellence; distinction, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @status of kings; future of monarchy
